title: 2021-2022 Faculty Development Opportunity with ASCEND and RCMI — D-RED YouTube (Hohmann)
content: YouTube recording of the 2021-08-01 Monthly D-RED Seminar '2021-2022 Faculty Development Opportunity with ASCEND and RCMI' presented by Christine Hohmann, PhD. Introduces ASCEND (A Student-Centered, Entrepreneurship Development training model) and RCMI (Research Centers in Minority Institutions) faculty development programs at MSU.
